subject.title: fix(gateway): bump `@vercel/oidc` to 3.0.5
subject.extra:
pr summary:
- bumps the @vercel/oidc dependency in the gateway package
- updates lockfile and changeset metadata for the provider package release
- maintenance change focused on gateway internals rather than a user-facing feature
